subject: Re:
body:
eva says don't look at yourself for at least three, weeks or you'll cry. it takes time.  


----- Original Message ----
From: Lesley Groff <lesley@nysgllc.com>
To: Jeeproject <jeeproject@yahoo.com>
Sent: Monday, May 26, 2008 11:31:51 AM
Subject: 


 
I have contacted Ghislaine and Dana...and Dana will come in for me tomorrow at 8:30!  Rahna is on her trip to Peru....
 
Right now all I am feeling is why the heck did I do this to myself!  My boobs are so enormeous that i feel deformed.  I just have to keep telling myself they are going to shrink down to what I want....I am sore and feel a lot of pressure from the bandages.  I go on Thursday to get them taken off and am hoping that is going to give me some relief.  Thank you for the phone call yesterday, I really appreciated it along with the encouragment that the way things look  now is not going to last.
 
I hope things are going well on your end!
 
Lesley
 
 
 
 
 
Lesley Groff
Executive Assistant to Jeffrey Epstein
